headline.purpose: Compact page and panel task headings.

body.purpose: Readable Chinese UI copy and generated replies.

label.purpose: Fields, status, metrics, and trace metadata.

shadows.name: modal-only
shadows.purpose: Only the access-token dialog may rise above its modal backdrop.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, disclosure, and feedback state changes.

components.name: Primary Action
components.description: The single transaction action in a task area.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 42px; padding: 10px 14px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--color-primary, oklch(0.575 0.165 50)); color: oklch(1 0 0); font: 700 14px system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.52 0.17 50); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.965 0.025 50); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Action
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 42px; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.72 0.015 205); border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.205 0.016 225); font: 650 14px system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.978 0.004 180); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.965 0.025 50); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Labeled Text Field
components.description: Persistent label and high-contrast focus for operational input.
components.html: <label class="ds-field">买家消息<textarea placeholder="例如：3000 元能出吗？"></textarea></label>
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: oklch(0.205 0.016 225); font: 650 12px system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field textarea { min-height: 96px; padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.72 0.015 205); border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.205 0.016 225); font: 400 14px/1.5 system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field textarea:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.965 0.025 50); border-color: oklch(0.575 0.165 50); }

components.name: Healthy Status
components.description: Written operational state with a redundant dot indicator.
components.css: .ds-status { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 8px 1fr; gap: 0 8px; padding: 8px 10px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.83 0.045 178); border-radius: 4px; background: oklch(0.955 0.022 178); color: oklch(0.31 0.066 178); font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-status span { grid-row: 1 / 3; align-self: center; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(0.37 0.075 178); } .ds-status small { font-size: 11px; } .ds-status strong { font-size: 13px; }

components.name: Selected Trace Row
components.description: A full-surface selection state without a colored side stripe.
components.css: .ds-trace { display: grid; gap: 5px; width: 100%; padding: 13px 14px; border: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.885 0.009 205); background: oklch(0.955 0.022 178); color: oklch(0.31 0.066 178); text-align: left; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-trace strong { font-size: 13px; } .ds-trace span { color: oklch(0.205 0.016 225); font-size: 13px; } .ds-trace small { color: oklch(0.48 0.016 215); font-size: 11px; } .ds-trace:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.965 0.025 50); outline-offset: -3px; }

narrative.overview: The console feels like a seller's well-organized guard desk: quiet white surfaces, dark legible text, sparse amber actions, and deep teal machine state. It is a dense task surface rather than a campaign or decorative monitoring wall.
keyCharacteristics: Amber for primary action and teal for state.
Flat bordered surfaces with compact spacing.
Responsive split views with progressive disclosure.

rules.name: The Ten Percent Rule
rules.body: Amber occupies less than ten percent of a screen and never decorates inactive content.

rules.name: The Written State Rule
rules.body: Operational state always includes readable words; color is never the only signal.

rules.name: The Flat Guard Rule
rules.body: Surfaces separated by spacing, tone, or border must not receive a shadow.

dos: Do show API health, Worker state, and dry-run mode before the first action.
Do use real API, runtime snapshot, memory, and Trace values.
Do verify 1440px desktop and 390px mobile without overflow.
donts: Don't build a 炫技 AI 后台.
Don't reproduce a 传统灰色管理系统.
Don't turn the console into a 营销落地页.
Don't combine panel borders with wide decorative shadows.
Don't use colored side stripes or nested cards.
